testcase.name: gameplay_smoke.regression
testcase.failure: {"primaryFailure": {"stepId": "click_missing_target_probe", "category": "click_target_missing", "expected": "target should exist in scene tree for this step", "actual": "click failed: TARGET_NOT_FOUND click target not found", "artifacts": ["logs/driver_flow.json", "logs/godot.log", "logs/stderr.log"]}, "flowAssertions": {"total": 5, "passed": 4, "failed": 1}}
